message.body: Riechert is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: humble stuff
🎶 'An Obsession With Kit' by Graham Kartna 🎶
riecheRave riecheRave riecheRave riecheRave riecheRave riecheRave
ew ew ew get rid of this timer and get livesplit open
but you used default guy tiles in your stage 1 riecheMonka
you can message zanis if you only want it on df
I hate waiting 4 days for my game to be uploaded
DO NOT DO WHAT I DID
also randy when is your rerun of this game
tryna see the game with livesplit again since riechert refuses riecheGoober
man i need to be able to use the reee emote
I’ll probably do a run tomorrow Kira
around this time maybe a little earlier
oh sick, im ready for that
HOW DO YOU GET SO MUCH DAMAGE
this avoidance was verified by a true american 🦅
if i could do that, i'd be a much better boshy runner
i cant take it any longer
i rebind to shift z in boshy now
riechert is 6 mins ahead of me ahhh
congrats on releasing btw, hardest part tbh
oh you're one min behind now
i saw please don't mention it
i can sometimes get stuck on some screens on your game for a good while. and the final save i either get it really quickly or just am unable to do it lmao
i think you did a good job. unlike me you actually dedicated time on your game and it's not just catching dust like mine is SirSad
coding is hard, and making it stand out is even harder
i will fr try to get a build by this weekend, and try getting you and randy to test
im taking the streaming break so i can finally try to focus more time on this lol
thank you, i will need it JinxLUL
also if it’s above 60 difficulty i probably shouldn’t test lmao
its not lmao dont worry. i dont know what lower difficulty is rated like, but im making something much easier than what i usally play
i've said before that im trying to make it a beginner to intermediate level, so that's what im aiming for with it
oh rad! always down for easier fangames
make sure you die here a lot so i can hear the full song riechert
now imagine if wonderful made a easy game nowadays, that would be so awesome
i wanted my game to have avoidances but so far it's just 3 shooting bosses :wah:
and there ARE iframes, cause FUCK boshy
impressive, I can’t make shoot bosses  like ever
@Magma_Man_ a bit is an understatement JinxLUL
@dweeb_iw i feel like avoidances sound much harder to make
having to synchronize attacks with music and all that
maybe, I’ve just made so many avoidances at this point it’s not hard to
designing shoot bosses takes a lot of creativity I think
i wouldn't really call my bosses creative lmao
you can replace the music per stage but yeah still annoying sorry
its kinda just attacks with a random sprite attached as the boss
designing avoidances takes alot of creativity too imo
also with avoidance I see the whole fight in my head with shoot bosses I just draw a blank and kinda just put random attacks in
oh right randy if you use my splits, maybe try fixing the incorrect split i had on it
or acc i'll just see where it is
yeah I’ll pick up best guy 3 again, stopped at the first boss
I still need to dl the splits actually Kira, good reminder
this is is so unique with sounds is wild
shapes is fun to mess with design wise
round shapes in fangame feels illegal
@dweeb_iw retime fallout to 1:01:11. that was the one i forgot to split
i still need to put down my ideas so I can’t say much
why does triple jump looks weird, but infinite jump isnt?
it could also be because second and third jump sounds are the same
you’re gonna be behind my time after this boss
that was my goal but idk if I can needle that well
just keep nerfing the game until you can JinxLUL
@lolkira24 you wish to nerf rukito area, right?
lets not talk about rukito area SirSad
2 hours and im still on save 3
i wonder if I give a good wall for that gap
longest a save has taken me so far
jack daniels just gatekept you from wr
assuming it is a standard grid, without being animated, you can get through the gap with 2 different aligns. that means either the left or right would be guaranteed to work
@Wolsk actually that's a really good point
we might need to incorporate that into speedrun tech
make it beating the boss without taking any damage so you have to do hitless and then end with the gap wolskCola
I’ve had a few, should have wrote them down
the spring should require clapping with the song tbh
how many games are even in the chaos pack
think I've only beaten like 4 or 5 from over the years
most are single avoidances but still
there’s a run for this game too btw if you wanna summit
the engine will be hard to beat
its actually not too bad to clear
has a few endings as well
if you don’t use debug of course
oh right @dweeb_iw maybe specify here that you can use arrow keys
like up and down ones I mean
random dennys in the middle of no where has basically saved me from starving a few times
breakfast diners are kinda life savers ngl
they exist everywhere and are open 24/7 usually
and yes I have a lot around me
when are you making a full yoshi needle game
all the best makers do it
it’s crazy how normal it is to kill yoshi in fangames, never noticed till someone said something the other day
im prob just unaware cause i only play raw precision needle lmfao
it certainly wasnt normal when warp the worlds came out I can say that much
still need to do a any% humble series run but yeah… very daunting to say the least
@dweeb_iw are you actually considering doing all of the games in one session?
well honestly i plan on doing that with k3 at one point, so i guess i can't say that you're out of your mind
it’ll probably be like 4 hours but idk if my hands can handle the pain
apart from the first 2, the other games won't be as bad for you
kira is doing all the k3 games in one sitting????
but yeah doing that will still be rough
@Wolsk nah i just mean i want to any% kamilia 3 one day 😭
just as soon as i beat the game for the first time
I reached final boss. havent touched it in a bit
no I havent done extra lol
some of the extra stuff will take me weeks or even months
gl if you do extra, I’ve been playing a boss from that and I don’t think I’ll ever clear it
i love the double plane skip
i mean they found it in testing
DotKid, but kid is just shrunk
unrelated question, does delfruit have a dark mode?
shoutouts to the random yep game I stole code from for this
i'll suggest it in the delfruit thread then
oh yeah true, now that the tournament is over skips would be nice
also nice game over egg lol
shooting both spikes can get insane damage but is very hard ngl
ah no. see. its not U its A
this is the typu of song I would use in my game 🐸
oh this was a great stage
how to make a long save good 101
Riechert ran humble abode earlier. he could’ve beat my time but he got jack danieled JinxLUL
yeah the ez long save + visual fun is great formula
oh rly lol. i might go for it tbh, pretty easy + good music could be fun
ive competed for anything longer than a 2 minute iwm level though
yeah it’s a lot less stressful speedrunning iwm levels
a lot less? not a lot more?
id go nuts if i choked at jack daniels
but you are pretty good at needle from what I recall so you should be fine
@quadstuffed i mean playing full games is more stressful because you’re dedicating a lot more time
king gizzard and the lizard wizard
me when I hear this 7 min song and go I want them to hear all of it in a stage :^)
a while ago i pirated a touhou all games pack on 4chan and it had a king gizzard album snuck in there lol
are u gonna beat them all? going for the custom game?
definitely smart to backup saves on the branches
was this a secret santa game for v or something
nah just added that for fun
i know how to code very well!
ahh. you didnt just displace the kid sprite. its a dedicated player sprite
I’m planing on having 1 at the end of each stage, but I have one stage that I plan on ending with a long platforming section
i go right, left, up, down here btw
why is this song so good lol
and I’m planning 6 stages total. currently working stage 5 is wip
just take your time Kira is my only advice and remember “fun”
nah you should play iw to win
i think the game is pretty fun so far for the most part
the main thing bugging me outside of my lack of coding ability, is that it's not really memorable. but i dont think i have the skill to do anything about that lmao
well done secret or meme/trap can help with that
oh you were talking about making, i see
there are secrets similar to celeste strawberries. im not doing traps tho lmfao
i get not wanting to do traps, i haven’t done that in years
i did not go this way, i dont remember this screen at all
dang i do like me my secrets..
it’s all just multiple paths to the same boss
yeah i remember this was a branching one
just like the song, gotta ask yourself, is it worth it?
it is a tad long, wish I made the enemies shoot stuff tbh
was so focused on recreating the MV
wait the ad warning is crazy lol
gotta shoot a few spikes but can be done
full jump full jump on the bhop
nal hated this save, but tbf it was buffed in the version he played
it took me a while, it’s pretty puzzly
bottom right and the drip was much harder
well all the jumps u can just shoot till u get good rng so its more of a patience check imo
that top right jump that forces your jump is kinda evil can’t lie
when you spend more time editing the reviews than making the stage
never really looked at all the clown gifs till now
oh shit this is the best avoidance in the game imo
this is the only path I enjoy nowadays
I should really start coding in ways that don’t rely on copy and paste NotLikeThis
nah dude everyone is copy and pasting
why copy and paste when you can code with drag n drop
why you keep dying on the free section
he likes the song too much to win
it happens to me sometimes too dw
i think ima head out now. i am way too tired lmao NotLikeThis
i'll continue with trying to get some more dev work and productive things done
what was the first game you were running anyway
you can only skip text cut scenes
the one that ended around like 1:12:xx
i mean if ur gonna put an unskippable cutscene, make it a spinning gif if some dudes dancing tbh
oh it was abode okay. im not sure if I ever actually played abode or not
riechert who do u play in overrwatch
no like who do you main
Riechert was doing stuff with Hanzo last time
oh nice. my top 3 are roadhog, wrecking ball, and zen probably
don’t forget to backup on screen 3
yeah im the same i only play ranked for the drives lol
try to start them as low rank as possible
yeah it can get toxic as f, possibly the most angry out of a lot of competitive games tbh
yeah agreed ive muted text chat sometimes
I just try stuff and hope it works LUL
i tried rivals, i like overwatch more. the destroying walls is cool though
u try deadlock? pretty popular rn
u can bhop and airstrafe in it which is pretty cool
but yeah also its like shoot minions for 80% of the game
you don’t have to do the platform a third time
the latest 5 character patch was really good
the game got way better after marvel rivals came out loll
rest up and take care now!
